subject: english
title: Vocabulary 2
subtitle: That's Really Interesting! — 5 collecting words: bug, comic book, dinosaur, fossil, stuffed animal.

content: Identify and use the 5 Vocabulary 2 words to talk about things people collect.
Connect collecting to real interests (comic books, fossils, stuffed animals, bugs, dinosaurs).
Use the academic word accuracy when checking their answers.
language: Produce and use: a bug, a comic book, a dinosaur, a fossil, a stuffed animal.
Sort items as alive vs. not alive using the Vocabulary 2 words.
Build a sentence like 'I gave Maria a fossil.' (recycles Vocabulary 1 and previews Grammar 2).
